title: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
summary: FBI director discloses Strategy holdings months after deadline: Report
briefing: Strategy is a registered US government contractor, though Kash Patel claimed that “no current conflict exists” with his $100,001 and $250,000 worth of the company’s stock that he reported late.

title: Ondo expands tokenized equities with onchain shareholder voting
summary: Ondo expands tokenized equities with onchain shareholder voting
briefing: Ondo's latest partnership adds shareholder governance to tokenized stocks as competition in blockchain-based equity offerings accelerates.

title: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
summary: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
briefing: From Ethereum’s Glamsterdam to Solana’s Alpenglow, 2026’s most important developments are protocol upgrades, not price charts.

title: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
summary: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
briefing: UK regulators published an update to a national retail payments blueprint, calling for infrastructure support for tokenization and interoperability with new forms of digital money.

title: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
summary: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
briefing: Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on Monad with 12 supported assets as the network commits $15 million in first-year incentives to build liquidity and adoption.

summary: Standard Chartered, Circle bring USDC minting onto banking rails
briefing: Standard Chartered and Circle launch bank-led USDC minting and redemption for institutions, starting in Dubai’s DIFC with planned global expansion.

title: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
summary: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
briefing: The Solana Foundation launched a framework for protocol-level governance, enabling validators with at least 100,000 delegated SOL to publish new proposals.

briefing: Standard Chartered is the first Global Systemically Important Bank authorized to let institutions mint and redeem Circle's USDC.

summary: Metaplanet Adds 2,823 Bitcoin in Q2 as Buying Pace Cools
briefing: The Japanese firm's 43,000-BTC stack now sits well below its cost basis, and it has leaned on debt over equity to keep buying.

title: Morning Minute: Robinhood Debuts 'Robinhood Chain'
